purpose: After each DONE task, immediately promote and start the next task until ACTIVE_QUEUE is COMPLETE.
algorithm: mark DONE with receipt and sha
if PENDING remains: promote next to IN_PROGRESS and report 'Следующая задача: <id> — приступаю'
stop only if queue_state COMPLETE and current_task null
forbidden: reporting final stop while ACTIVE_QUEUE has IN_PROGRESS or PENDING
waiting for operator between roadmap tasks unless queue is COMPLETE or blocker requires external secret
